function.name: edit_function
function.description: Edit or delete a function/method/class by name. No need to specify line numbers - the tool finds the symbol automatically. Use action='delete' to remove a function entirely, or action='replace' with new_content to replace it.

name.description: Name of the function/method/class to edit

action.description: Action to perform. Default: 'replace' if new_content provided, 'delete' otherwise

new_content.description: New content for the function. Omit or leave empty to delete the function.
